raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht rangi / tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNgs : 
Ka fhi Weeta ne taps wairs
nofaukta Towete/ jeb ta Eeleija
Ben-Innoma / bet Slepkawi-
bas-Eeleija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es isnihzinaschu to Pa-
dohmu Juhda un Jerusalemes
schinni Weetâ / un likchu tohs
zaur Sohbinu krist preeksch win-
nu Eenaidneekeem / un zaur to
Rohku to/ kas winnu Dwehseli
mekle/ un es nodohschu winnu
nomircruschas Meejas par Bar-
ribu teem Putneem appaksch
Debbes / un teem Swehreem
wirs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es liktchu scho Pilssah-
tn par pohstu Weetu/ un par
Apsimeekli/ wiss/ kas fezzen eet/
tas brihnitees / un swilpehs pahr
wisahin winno Mohkahn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dohscnu teem tahs
Meejas winno Dehlu / un tahs
Meejas winno Meitu ehft/ un
tee ehdihê tkweens tahs Meejas
fava Tuwaka eckich tahm Beh-
dahm/ un eckich tahs Baalibas/
ar ko winnu Eenaidneeki/ un kas
winnu Dwehfeles mekle/ tohe
apvehdinabs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew to Kruhsi
fadausibt preekich to Wthru Az-
zim/ kas ar tewim irr gabjutchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un uhs teem fazziht : Ta-
fakka tas KUNGS Zebaot : Ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta darrischu es fchai
Weetai/ fakka tas KUNGS :
Un winnas Eedsihmotajeem/ un
darritchu scho Pilefahtu ka Tow-
eti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Namini no Jeru-
salemes/ un tee Nammi to Keh-
nixu no Juhda buhs sagahniti/
itt ka tee skaisti Namini eeksch
Towetes/ ar wisfeem teem Nam-
meem/ us kuru Jumteen tee
wisiam Debbes Spehkam irr
kwehpinaischi / un fivescheem
Deeweem Dseerramo-Uppurus
uppurejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Jeremijus no
Towetes nahze/ kurp tas KUNgs
winan bij fuhtijs fluddinaht /
tad stahweja winach eekich ta
Pagalmja ta KUNGA Nam-
ma/ un fazztja uhs wisfeem Lau-
dim:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot / tas Israëla Deews ;
Rauqi/ es weditschu pahr scho
Pilsfahtu/ un pabr wisfeem win-
na Pilsfahteem to Launumu /
to es pabr to efmu runnajs/ ta-
pehz ka tee tarvu Pakanfu irr ap-
zeettinaischi/ un mannis Wahr-
ous ne klautijscht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
